title: salvia officinalis var. lavandulifolia
intro: Salvia officinalis var. lavandulifolia, also known as Spanish sage, is a subspecies of the sage plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Spain and Portugal and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis var. lavandulifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used as an ingredient in herbal supplements.
